selections.name: Rise To Glory
selections.reason: Racing well recently, strong 2nd last start. Avoids the heavy weight penalty of the top weight and gets a favorable setup.

selections.name: Bartime
selections.reason: Resuming but has impressed at the trials. Capable of a bold showing fresh and has class.

selections.name: Just Saint James
selections.reason: Classy type but carries top weight of 134lbs which is a significant penalty on the Soft 6 track. Still a major threat on raw ability.

selections.name: Show The Way
selections.reason: Boxed on steadily last start, drawn well to get a soft run and can figure in the minors.

danger_horse.name: Just Saint James
danger_horse.reason: Top rated horse on speed figures but vulnerable due to the 134lb weight on a soft track.

selections.name: Swingman
selections.reason: Set the pace last start and was only gunned down late by Snitzalatte. Meets that rival much better at the weights here.

selections.name: Snitzalatte
selections.reason: Won nicely last start but carries top weight of 134lbs, which is a major penalty on this wet track. Still the class of the field.

selections.name: Slip The Jab
selections.reason: Got back early last start but ran on well. Can figure in the finish with a cleaner trip.

selections.name: Door Buster
selections.reason: Returned from a break with a solid 3rd. Strips fitter and gets blinkers on to sharpen her up.

danger_horse.name: Snitzalatte
danger_horse.reason: Undefeated in recent form and could simply be too good despite the massive weight.

selections.name: Desert Waves
selections.reason: Won well last start over this track and distance. Hard to knock his recent form and will be tough to run down.

selections.name: Westbound
selections.reason: Showed enough when a beaten favorite on debut and can bounce back to winning ways with natural improvement.

selections.name: Stylish Lord
selections.reason: Faded last start but drops in distance which looks to suit better. Capable on his day.

selections.name: Superfluous
selections.reason: Likely to get back in the run but watch for him flying late stepping up in distance.

danger_horse.name: Westbound
danger_horse.reason: Lightly raced progressive type who can easily upset the top pick.

selections.name: Holler Nuff
selections.reason: Chasing a hat-trick after a strong win last start. Far too good recently and can continue to work through the grades.

selections.name: Bird's The Word
selections.reason: Racing well recently and can sit much closer this time around from a good draw. Major threat.

selections.name: I Dreamed A Dream
selections.reason: Suited by the rise in trip and can go one better after a solid 2nd behind the top pick last start.

selections.name: Black For Cash
selections.reason: Good win here last start and is worth having on side from the inside gate.

danger_horse.name: Bird's The Word
danger_horse.reason: Consistent veteran who gets a perfect map from barrier 2.

selections.name: King Hit
selections.reason: On a three-run winning streak. Tracked the speed and won nicely last start. Can extend his winning run.

selections.name: Avoidance
selections.reason: Won well last start defeating Bakeel. Has some niggle out in trip but makes his own luck on the speed.

selections.name: Antique Star
selections.reason: Drawn the inside barrier and can make her presence felt with Berry taking the ride.

selections.name: Bakeel
selections.reason: Improved sharply last start and looks poised to strike third-up, though the 133lb weight is a concern on the soft track.

danger_horse.name: Avoidance
danger_horse.reason: Tactical speed makes him dangerous in a race that could lack tempo.

selections.name: Kings Court
selections.reason: Won nicely last start and can extend his winning run. Trending the right way and looks well placed.

selections.name: Storm Away
selections.reason: Resumes after a break but has been in the money when fresh before. Hard to hold out if he resumes where he left off.

selections.name: Awesome Boy
selections.reason: Returning from a spell and has won previously when first up. Given an easy trial coming in.

selections.name: Niccimota
selections.reason: Won well last start but this is tougher. Still trending the right way and can't be ignored.

danger_horse.name: Storm Away
danger_horse.reason: Lethal fresh record makes him a massive threat despite the wide draw.

selections.name: Beatty
selections.reason: Tracked the speed and won well last start. Plenty to like with Pike riding and blinkers going on from the inside draw.

selections.name: Aurum Belle
selections.reason: Puts an unbeaten record on the line. Classy filly but has no luck with the barrier draw, which makes her vulnerable.

selections.name: Maria Lucia
selections.reason: Recent form is sound. Drawn well, blinkers go on, and she will be fitter for the fresh run.

selections.name: He's A Machino
selections.reason: Third-up today and poised to strike with Schiller going on. Solid 2nd last start.

danger_horse.name: Aurum Belle
danger_horse.reason: Undefeated star filly. If she overcomes the wide gate, she can win.

selections.name: Jigsaw
selections.reason: On a six-run winning streak, including a G1 win last start. Fast, tough, and looking to make it seven in a row.

selections.name: Caballus
selections.reason: Won the G1 Newmarket last start. Held on nicely and makes plenty of appeal with his racing pattern.

selections.name: Rope Them In
selections.reason: Won the G3 Roma Cup last start. Looks the best of the locals and can measure up here.

selections.name: Rey Magnerio
selections.reason: Strong late in the William Reid last start. Looks to get all the favors here for Pike.

danger_horse.name: Caballus
danger_horse.reason: Elite G1 winner who can easily turn the tables on the top pick.

selections.name: Repossession
selections.reason: Second in a small field last start. Closed off well in the Roma Cup and looks the one to beat from the inside draw.

selections.name: Sky Duke
selections.reason: Set the pace last start before fading. Can improve and make his presence felt.

selections.name: Petula
selections.reason: Third-up today and won third-up previously. Won't be far away.

selections.name: Cut The Talk
selections.reason: Outside chance based on his 4th in the Roma Cup two starts back.

danger_horse.name: Sky Duke
danger_horse.reason: Class runner of the field who can dictate terms if left alone in front.
